# Kill / Scale / Pivot Rules

## Green — Scale

Scale when:

```text
primary metric beats rolling baseline by meaningful margin
no guardrail metric fails
mechanism replicated at least twice, ideally three times
comments/sentiment do not show trust failure
```

Actions:

```text
make 5 more variants
turn into named series
create search-native version
cross-platform translate
```

## Yellow — Replicate

Replicate when:

```text
one strong signal but sample is small
performance is mixed
one platform works but another fails
saves/follows strong but reach weak
```

Actions:

```text
run controlled exposure
change one variable only
try a different surface
wait for 7d/30d readout if search-native
```

## Orange — Rewrite

Rewrite when:

```text
early signal works but body fails
completion works but action fails
search works but feed fails
comments show confusion
```

Actions:

```text
move payoff earlier
simplify text
add proof
change CTA
make first frame clearer
```

## Red — Kill

Kill when:

```text
3 related variants fail primary metric
trust guardrail fails
clickbait gets starts but poor completion/follows
format cannot be produced consistently
mechanism only works with trend timing
```

Actions:

```text
archive mechanism
write why it failed
reuse useful sub-components only
```

## Pivot

Pivot when:

```text
feed fails but search works
save rate works but follow rate fails
comments show a better topic than the original
non-followers reject but followers like it
```

Actions:

```text
change surface
change target action
change audience specificity
turn into series/profile asset
```
